# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
    apiVersion: "2021-03-01"
    name: "[variables('vmName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "Canonical"
          offer: "UbuntuServer"
          sku: "18.04-LTS"
          version: "latest"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(variables('vmName'), '-osdisk')]"
          caching: "ReadWrite"
          createOption: "FromImage"
        dataDisks:
          - lun: 0
            caching: "ReadOnly"
            createOption: "Empty"
            diskSizeGB: 128
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('vmName'), '-nic')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "[concat(variables('vmName'), '-ipconfig')]"
          properties:
            subnet:
              id: "[variables('subnetRef')]"
            privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[parameters('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "eastus"
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "myWebAppVM"
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_DS1_v2"
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "myVnet"
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.0.0/16"
  subnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "mySubnet"
  subnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.1.0/24"
variables:
  subnetRef: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks'), '/', parameters('vnetName'), '/subnets/', parameters('subnetName'))]"
  vmName: "[parameters('vmName')]"
